steps.title: Add 200 µL of 1mm beads to 1
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of 1mm beads to 1.5ml enppendorf tube

steps.title: Add 600 µL of lysis solution to 1
steps.instruction: Add 600 µL of lysis solution to 1.5ml enppendorf tube

steps.title: Add 200 µL of 0
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of 0.5mm beads to 1.5ml enppendorf tube

steps.title: Collect 9-10 µg of sample to 1
steps.instruction: Collect 9-10 µg of sample to 1.5ml enppendorf tube

steps.title: Put 1
steps.instruction: Put 1.5ml eppendorf tube in the mixmill for sample crush; at condition: 30 rpm/s, for 4mins 00:04:00

steps.title: Put 1
steps.instruction: Put 1.5ml eppendorf tube in centrifuge for centrifugation, at this condition: 17.0 x g, 25 °C, 3 minutes

steps.title: Add 600 µL of DNA binding...
steps.instruction: Add 600 µL of DNA binding buffer to 1st well of 96 deep well plate

steps.title: Add 200 µL of sample (lysate)...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of sample (lysate) from 15ml centrifuge microtube to 1st well of 96 deep well plate Usally add last

steps.title: Add 25 µL of magnetic beads...
steps.instruction: Add 25 µL of magnetic beads to 1st well of 96 deep well plate Shake the bottle and pipetting before using magnetic beads

steps.title: Add 500 µL of Wash 1...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL of Wash 1 to 2nd well of 96 deep well plate

steps.title: Add 500 µL of Wash 2...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL of Wash 2 to 3rd well of 96 deep well plate

steps.title: Add 500 µL of Wash 2...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL of Wash 2 to 4th well of 96 deep well plate

steps.title: Add 100 µL of water to...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL of water to 5th well of 96 deep well plate

steps.title: Put in the automated DNA extraction machine
steps.instruction: Put in the automated DNA extraction machine
